case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. XIANGFEI BAI ET AL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAI, XIANGFEI $3,548.78 PRINCIPAL, $258.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,807.73, SEE SCANNED DOC
